title: OpenPX V0.6.1 Schema
description: JSON Schema validation rules for Open Product Exchange V0.6.1 — adds optional content.seo_title and content.seo_description (SEO/meta fields on the shared content definition; product/variant/listing, #1724). V0.6.0 added product/variant channel_content (#1718)

slug.description: URL-safe identifier (lowercase, hyphens allowed). Cannot start or end with a hyphen, and no consecutive hyphens.
URL-safe identifier within organization (lowercase, hyphens allowed). Cannot start or end with a hyphen, and no consecutive hyphens.

key_ref.description: Path to the organization's public signing key

algorithm.description: Signing algorithm used by this organization

condition.description: Product condition. Defaults to 'new' if not specified.

asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number (exactly 10 uppercase alphanumeric characters)

nsn.description: NATO Stock Number — hyphenated NATO form (e.g. 1234-56-789-1234) or local/alphanumeric form (e.g. 850519-S01)

primary_category_id.description: UUID v7 FK to openpx_category.id (populated after taxonomy tables exist)

category_schema_url.description: URL to category-specific attribute validation schema (optional). If provided, product.attributes will be validated against this schema in addition to base schema.

channel_content.description: Per-channel content variants, keyed by channel identifier (e.g. 'amazon-seller', 'walmart', 'shopify'). Each entry has the shape of `content` (all fields optional, extra keys allowed); sparse-override, deep-merged over `content` when a listing for that channel is created.

technical_data.description: Measured/tested technical properties grouped by section name

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical JSON representation

variants.description: Embedded variants for this product. Each variant is a sparse override — only include fields that differ from the product.

baa_taa_compliant.description: Compliant with US Buy American Act (BAA) / Trade Agreements Act (TAA) for federal procurement

taa_compliant_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code asserting TAA compliance (designated country of origin under Trade Agreements Act)

hazmat.description: Hazardous materials compliance data (regulation, UN code, GHS, SDS URL). Sibling to warnings: warnings carries boolean attestations; hazmat carries structured regulatory data.

regulation.description: Dangerous-goods regulatory framework declaration (mirrors Amazon supplier_declared_dg_hz_regulation)

safety_data_sheet_url.description: URL to the Safety Data Sheet (SDS or MSDS) document

media.description: URLs to compliance-related media (certificates, declarations, regulatory documents). Generic complement to safety_data_sheet_url under hazmat; used for any compliance regime requiring document attestations.

safety_attestation.description: Attestation that product meets applicable safety regulations for its category and channel scope

gpsr.description: EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR, effective 2024) compliance fields. Article 4 (Responsible Person), Article 9 (Manufacturer obligations).

responsible_person.description: EU-resident Responsible Person contact (Article 4 of GPSR)

sustainability.description: Sustainability metrics, material claims, carbon footprint, and environmental declarations

green_purchasing_compliant.description: Compliant with US Federal Green Purchasing Law (FAR 23.703 — environmentally preferred products)

country_of_origin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where raw materials originate

country_of_assembly.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where product is assembled

country_of_last_processing.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where last substantial transformation occurs

country_of_design.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where product is designed

instructions.description: Human-facing operational guidance for using and caring for the product

preparation.description: Steps to ready the product before first use

usage.description: How to operate or use the product

safety.description: Safety warnings and precautions during use

storage.description: How to store the product when not in use

cleaning.description: How to clean or care for the product itself

maintenance.description: Ongoing upkeep to extend product life

disposal.description: End-of-life handling, recycling, or disposal guidance

clean_up.description: How to clean tools or work area after use

description.description: Free-text warranty description, disclaimer, or legal prose

type.description: Standard reference such as 'UL', 'UL Listed', 'ISO 11148-6', 'ATEX 2014/34/EU'. Accepts letters, digits, spaces, underscores, dots, slashes, parens, hyphens. Cannot contain commas or semicolons — those are list separators handled by the CSV mapper.

variant.description: Variant is a sparse override of product fields. Only include fields that differ from the parent product. All product fields can be overridden except id, brand_id, and classification.

product_id.description: Reference to parent product. Variant inherits all product fields unless explicitly overridden.

status.description: Optional - inherits from product if not specified

condition.description: Optional - inherits from product if not specified

identifiers.description: Only include identifiers that differ from product. SKU typically overridden for each variant.

asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number (exactly 10 uppercase alphanumeric characters)

nsn.description: NATO Stock Number — hyphenated NATO form (e.g. 1234-56-789-1234) or local/alphanumeric form (e.g. 850519-S01)

physical.description: Only include physical specs that differ from product (e.g., weight varies by size)

content.description: Rarely overridden, but possible for variant-specific content

channel_content.description: Per-channel variant content variants, keyed by channel identifier. Each entry has the shape of `content` (all fields optional, extra keys allowed); sparse-override, deep-merged over variant `content` when a listing for that channel is created.

media_assets.description: Variant can override product media. Arrays replace (not merge).

technical_data.description: Measured/tested technical properties grouped by section name

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical JSON representation

typed_attribute_value.description: Open-attribute measurement value: a numeric value with a free-form unit of measure.

typed_attribute_range.description: Open-attribute measurement range: numeric min and max with a free-form unit of measure.

open_attribute_value.description: Permitted value shapes for an open attribute: scalar, null, measurement {value,unit}, or range {min,max,unit}.

open_attributes.description: Open attribute bag: five universal string attributes (color/size/material/finish/pattern) plus arbitrary additional attributes whose values follow open_attribute_value (scalar | {value,unit} | {min,max,unit} | null). e.g. processor_brand: 'intel', ram_gb: 16, weight_capacity: {value: 50, unit: 'kg'}.

product_id.description: Reference to the product this listing is for

brand_id.description: Relationship FK to the brand entity. Mirrors product.brand_id; consumer connectors resolve brand data via brands/{brand_id}.json at sync time. Optional.

channel.description: Channel identifier. See config/schemas/registries/channels.json for known values.

condition.description: Optional - inherits from product if not specified

asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number (exactly 10 uppercase alphanumeric characters)

nsn.description: NATO Stock Number — hyphenated NATO form (e.g. 1234-56-789-1234) or local/alphanumeric form (e.g. 850519-S01)

variants.description: Variant-level listing details. Each entry is a sparse override of listing-level defaults.

variant_id.description: Reference to the variant in the product

asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number (exactly 10 uppercase alphanumeric characters)

nsn.description: NATO Stock Number — hyphenated NATO form (e.g. 1234-56-789-1234) or local/alphanumeric form (e.g. 850519-S01)

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical JSON representation

locale.description: Locale code for this content (e.g., en-US, fr-CA)

model_name.description: Buyer-facing marketing/series model name (e.g. Amazon model_name 'W3000 Series 20V Impact Wrench'). Distinct from content.name (full title) and identifiers.model_number/mpn (part number). Optional; not added to any required set.

seo_title.description: SEO/meta title for search engines and channel listing pages. Optional; not added to any required set.

seo_description.description: SEO/meta description for search engines and channel listing pages. Optional; not added to any required set.

sub_brand.description: Distinct brand identity within parent brand

generation.description: Version or iteration of a product line

key_ref.description: Path to public key file in repo (e.g., .openpx/keys/org-2025-06-15.pub)

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the entity was signed
